title: JeffKarats Dyed Ice Mod
description: Adds 16 colored (blue) ice blocks. Allows for light to shine through as well. Created by Twitch Streamer JeffKarats.
body:
# 🧊 Dyed Ice – Colored Slippery Blocks for Style and Speed
Tired of boring blue ice? Spice up your builds and arenas with 16 vibrant, craftable ice blocks in every Minecraft dye color!
![Ice with Backlight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/101243ee4d033830359507608fcaada8e689d187.png)

### Features:

- 🧃 16 dye-colored ice blocks
 
- ❄️ Same slipperiness as blue ice
 
- 🎨 Perfect for racetracks, rinks, and redstone
 
- 🧱 Craftable by surrounding blue ice with dye (yields 8 dyed ice)
 
- 💎 Transparent, decorative, and stackable
![All the colors of the ice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e845bff4737c44e414c914ac6be112514490ec5d.png)
### Use Cases:

- Hockey rinks 🏒

- Ice roads 🚗
 
- Color-coded minigames 🕹️
 
- Vibes ❇️
 ![An example of an icerink ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58b4a11d15559873811c41bc3c6ca1bb91a13174.png)
## No performance hit. No weird behavior. Just ice, but make it fashion.
